title: Senior Backend Engineer
content: We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to lead our platform development. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Python and PostgreSQL with experience building scalable REST APIs. You should have at least 5 years of experience in retail technology platforms, managing databases and optimizing query performance. Experience with Docker and Kubernetes is highly valued. You will work on mission-critical systems serving 10M+ users daily.

title: Full Stack Developer
content: Join our growing e-commerce team! We need a Full Stack Developer proficient in JavaScript/React on the frontend and Node.js/Python on the backend. Familiarity with MongoDB or PostgreSQL is essential. You should have 3-5 years of experience building responsive web applications. Experience with AWS or Google Cloud is a plus. We work on modern fintech payment systems and real-time inventory management.

title: Data Engineer
content: We are hiring a Data Engineer to build and maintain our data infrastructure. You must have strong SQL skills and experience with Python or Scala for data processing. Apache Spark and data warehousing (Snowflake or Redshift) experience is required. Minimum 4 years in data engineering roles. Experience with ETL pipelines, data quality frameworks, and big data technologies is essential. Knowledge of machine learning pipelines is a bonus.

title: DevOps Engineer
content: Looking for a DevOps Engineer to manage our cloud infrastructure. You need strong hands-on experience with Kubernetes, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitLab CI, or GitHub Actions). AWS or GCP certification is preferred. You should have 3+ years in DevOps/SRE roles. Experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform) and monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana) is critical. Strong Linux administration skills required.

title: QA Automation Engineer
content: We need a QA Automation Engineer to build and maintain automated test suites. Strong proficiency in Selenium or Cypress for web automation is required. You should know Python, JavaScript, or Java for writing test scripts. Minimum 2 years in test automation. Experience with Jenkins, GitLab CI, or other CI systems for test execution is a plus. Knowledge of API testing with Postman/REST Assured is valuable.
